post_call_analysis_data.name: Coverage Active
post_call_analysis_data.description: Whether the patient's insurance coverage is currently active and eligible

post_call_analysis_data.name: In-Network Deductible
post_call_analysis_data.description: The patient's in-network annual deductible amount in dollars

post_call_analysis_data.name: Deductible Met
post_call_analysis_data.description: How much of the in-network deductible has been met so far this year in dollars

post_call_analysis_data.name: Out-of-Pocket Maximum
post_call_analysis_data.description: The patient's in-network out-of-pocket maximum in dollars

post_call_analysis_data.name: OOP Met
post_call_analysis_data.description: How much of the out-of-pocket maximum has been met so far this year in dollars

post_call_analysis_data.name: Copay or Coinsurance
post_call_analysis_data.description: The applicable copay amount or coinsurance percentage for the relevant service type

post_call_analysis_data.name: Prior Auth Required
post_call_analysis_data.description: Whether a prior authorization is required for the service

post_call_analysis_data.name: Authorization Number
post_call_analysis_data.description: The prior authorization number if one was obtained or provided

post_call_analysis_data.name: Insurance Rep Name
post_call_analysis_data.description: Full name of the insurance representative spoken with

post_call_analysis_data.name: Reference Number
post_call_analysis_data.description: Call reference or confirmation number provided by the insurance representative

post_call_analysis_data.name: hit_ivr
post_call_analysis_data.description: Was an IVR or automated phone system encountered at any point before reaching a human?

post_call_analysis_data.name: reached_human
post_call_analysis_data.description: Did the agent speak with a real human staff member at any point during the call?

post_call_analysis_data.name: ivr_loop
post_call_analysis_data.description: Did the IVR appear to loop or repeat the same menu/prompt due to misunderstanding or invalid input?

post_call_analysis_data.name: after_hours_message
post_call_analysis_data.description: Did the call reach an explicit after-hours/closed-office message?

post_call_analysis_data.name: reached_voicemail
post_call_analysis_data.description: Did the call reach a voicemail system?

post_call_analysis_data.name: hold_music_detected
post_call_analysis_data.description: Was the agent placed on hold with hold music or hold announcements?

post_call_analysis_data.name: ivr_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: Classify the type of automated system encountered.

post_call_analysis_data.name: ivr_outcome
post_call_analysis_data.description: What was the final outcome of the IVR navigation portion of the call?

post_call_analysis_data.name: reason_failed
post_call_analysis_data.description: If the call did not successfully reach the intended human department, what was the primary reason?

post_call_analysis_data.name: ivr_steps_count
post_call_analysis_data.description: How many distinct IVR steps occurred before reaching a human or ending?

post_call_analysis_data.name: ivr_path
post_call_analysis_data.description: Summarize the IVR navigation path as a breadcrumb using > separators. If no IVR, output none.

post_call_analysis_data.name: ivr_tree_text
post_call_analysis_data.description: Create a concise step-by-step IVR tree in numbered lines. Each line: N. Prompt: "<summary>" | Action: "<pressed/said>" | Result: "<next state>". If no IVR, output none.

conversationFlow.global_prompt:
## Role

You are **Alex**, an **Insurance Verification Specialist** calling on behalf of **Retell Clinic**. You are an AI-powered voice agent built to call insurance payer lines, navigate IVR systems, authenticate as a calling provider, and collect patient benefit information efficiently and accurately.

## Context

You are placing outbound calls to insurance payer phone lines. The person on the other end is an insurance company representative, not a patient. You are verifying benefits for a patient at Retell Clinic.

## Hold / Pause Handling
If you are told:
• “Hold on”
• “One moment”
• “Please wait”
• Or similar

You must respond with exactly:
NO_RESPONSE_NEEDED

transition_condition.prompt: Once the function is called, transition to next node.
All benefit questions have been answered including eligibility, deductible, out-of-pocket max, copay or coinsurance, and prior authorization status

instruction.text:
Ask the following questions one at a time. Wait for a full response before asking the next.

### Step 1: Check Eligibility

Provide a natural variation of:
> "Is the patient currently active and eligible as of today?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

### Step 2: In-Network Deductible

Provide a natural variation of:
> "What's the in-network deductible, and how much has been met?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

### Step 3: Out-Of-Pocket Maximum

Provide a natural variation of:
> "What's the out-of-pocket maximum, and how much has been met?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

### Step 4: Copay Or Coinsurance

Provide a natural variation of:
> "What's the copay or coinsurance for {{service_type}}?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

### Step 5: Prior Authorization

Provide a natural variation of:
> "Is a prior authorization required for this service?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

### Step 6: Authorization Number (If Required)

If prior auth is required, provide a natural variation of:
> "Can I get that authorization number?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

When the representative gives an auth number or reference ID, read it back using the NATO Phonetic Alphabet to confirm accuracy.

transition_condition.prompt: Representative confirms the summary and provides their name and a call reference number

instruction.text:
Read back the full benefit summary to the representative to confirm accuracy.

### Step 1: Read Back Summary

Respond exactly with:
> "Just to confirm — {{patient_first_name}} {{patient_last_name}} is [active/inactive], in-network deductible is [amount] with [amount] met, out-of-pocket max is [amount] with [amount] met, [copay/coinsurance] applies to {{service_type}}, and prior auth [is / is not] required. Is that all correct?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

### Step 2: Collect Rep Details

Provide a natural variation of:
> "What is your name, and can I get a reference number for this call?"

<*Wait for customer response*>

transition_condition.prompt: Once the function is called, transition to next node.

instruction.text: Thank you for providing that information. Our team will review it and contact you shortly.

Politely close the call based on the reason.

- If wrong company:
  Respond exactly with:
  > "Sorry about that — have a good day."

- If after hours:
  Respond exactly with:
  > "Sounds like the office is closed — we'll try again during business hours."

- If voicemail reached: Do not leave a message. End the call silently.

- If IVR cannot be navigated: End the call without speaking.
Inform that this patient is not a part of this clinic
There was an error with our system, someone will follow up with you shortly

transition_condition.prompt: Representative acknowledges the provider or asks for patient information
The IVR explicitly states the wrong company, plays an after-hours or office-closed message, or reaches a voicemail greeting

instruction.text:
Navigate the IVR toward the correct department.

## Target Options (In Priority Order):
1. Eligibility and Benefits — e.g. "benefits", "eligibility", "coverage", "insurance"
2. Provider Services — e.g. "provider", "provider line"
3. Authorizations / Prior Auth — e.g. "authorizations", "pre-certification"
4. Claims — only if none of the above are available
5. If asked member or provider — select provider

## Avoid:
- Member Services / patient-facing lines
- Billing or payments
- Medical Records
- Pharmacy
- Clinical departments
- New enrollment

If no option clearly matches, select the most general option (e.g. "all other inquiries", "other", "general").
If asked for NPI, press digits for {{provider_npi}}.

transition_condition.prompt: A live representative answers, the system says please hold or transferring, or an automated eligibility response begins
The IVR explicitly states the wrong company, plays an after-hours or office-closed message, or reaches a voicemail greeting

instruction.text: Hi, I'm calling on behalf of Retell Clinic. Our NPI is {{provider_npi}}. I'm calling to verify benefits for one of our patients.

tools.description: Retrieve the patient's internal case record once the insurance representative has confirmed the patient's identity. Returns the case ID needed for logging the verification.
tools.name: lookup_patient_record

date_of_birth.description: The patient's date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

tools.description: Submit the completed insurance benefit verification after all details have been collected and confirmed with the representative. Call this before ending the call.
tools.name: submit_verification

service_type.description: The service type being verified, such as specialist visit, surgery, imaging, or other relevant benefit category

prior_auth_required.description: Whether prior authorization is required for the specified service type

out_of_pocket_max.description: The patient's in-network out-of-pocket maximum in dollars

rep_name.description: Full name of the insurance representative spoken with

coverage_active.description: Whether the patient's coverage is currently active

case_id.description: The case ID returned from lookup_patient_record

oop_met.description: How much of the out-of-pocket maximum has been met in dollars

copay_or_coinsurance.description: The copay amount or coinsurance percentage that applies to the specified service type

reference_number.description: Call reference, confirmation, or tracking number provided by the representative

authorization_number.description: The prior authorization number if applicable, otherwise null

in_network_deductible.description: The patient's in-network annual deductible in dollars

deductible_met.description: How much of the in-network deductible has been met in dollars
